issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated'. The effect activates when the card enters play, not from an activated ability.
Duration should be 'Permanent' not 'EndOfTurn'. Rush keyword is a permanent passive ability, not a temporary effect that expires.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, this Character gains [Rush].
